SeamReportCompleteState.description: State model derived from SeamReportComplete TLA+ spec

TotalEdges.description: Verifier for invariant TotalEdges from SeamReportComplete spec

CurrentSum.description: Verifier for invariant CurrentSum from SeamReportComplete spec

CompletenessHolds.description: Verifier for invariant CompletenessHolds from SeamReportComplete spec

MonotonicProgress.description: Verifier for invariant MonotonicProgress from SeamReportComplete spec

NonNegative.message:
NonNegative violation: /\ mm_count  >= 0
    /\ ur_count  >= 0
    /\ sat_count >= 0
    /\ total     >= 0
NonNegative.description: Verifier for invariant NonNegative from SeamReportComplete spec

TotalIsN.description: Verifier for invariant TotalIsN from SeamReportComplete spec

FinalCorrectness.message:
FinalCorrectness violation: phase = "done" =>
        /\ mm_count  = MaxMismatches
        /\ ur_count  = MaxUnresolved
        /\ sat_count = Ma...
FinalCorrectness.description: Verifier for invariant FinalCorrectness from SeamReportComplete spec

SeamInvariants.message:
SeamInvariants violation: /\ CompletenessHolds
    /\ MonotonicProgress
    /\ NonNegative
    /\ TotalIsN
    /\ FinalCorrectness
SeamInvariants.description: Verifier for invariant SeamInvariants from SeamReportComplete spec

assert_TotalEdges.message: Assertion failed: TotalEdges — MaxMismatches + MaxUnresolved + MaxSatisfied
assert_TotalEdges.description: Test assertion for TotalEdges from SeamReportComplete spec

assert_CurrentSum.message: Assertion failed: CurrentSum — mm_count + ur_count + sat_count
assert_CurrentSum.description: Test assertion for CurrentSum from SeamReportComplete spec

assert_CompletenessHolds.message: Assertion failed: CompletenessHolds — phase = "done" => CurrentSum = total
assert_CompletenessHolds.description: Test assertion for CompletenessHolds from SeamReportComplete spec

assert_MonotonicProgress.message: Assertion failed: MonotonicProgress — phase # "init" => CurrentSum <= total
assert_MonotonicProgress.description: Test assertion for MonotonicProgress from SeamReportComplete spec

assert_NonNegative.condition:
and mm_count  >= 0
    and ur_count  >= 0
    and sat_count >= 0
    and total     >= 0
assert_NonNegative.message:
Assertion failed: NonNegative — /\ mm_count  >= 0
    /\ ur_count  >= 0
    /\ sat_count >= 0
    /\ total     >= 0
assert_NonNegative.description: Test assertion for NonNegative from SeamReportComplete spec

assert_TotalIsN.message: Assertion failed: TotalIsN — phase # "init" => total = TotalEdges
assert_TotalIsN.description: Test assertion for TotalIsN from SeamReportComplete spec

assert_FinalCorrectness.condition:
phase = "done" implies
        and mm_count  = MaxMismatches
        and ur_count  = MaxUnresolved
        and sat_count = MaxSatisfied
        and total     = TotalEdges
        and CurrentSum = TotalEdges
assert_FinalCorrectness.message:
Assertion failed: FinalCorrectness — phase = "done" =>
        /\ mm_count  = MaxMismatches
        /\ ur_count  = MaxUnresolved
        /\ sat_count = Ma...
assert_FinalCorrectness.description: Test assertion for FinalCorrectness from SeamReportComplete spec

assert_SeamInvariants.condition:
and CompletenessHolds
    and MonotonicProgress
    and NonNegative
    and TotalIsN
    and FinalCorrectness
assert_SeamInvariants.message:
Assertion failed: SeamInvariants — /\ CompletenessHolds
    /\ MonotonicProgress
    /\ NonNegative
    /\ TotalIsN
    /\ FinalCorrectness
assert_SeamInvariants.description: Test assertion for SeamInvariants from SeamReportComplete spec
